channel.title: delaunay on StataViz by Asjad Naqvi
channel.description: Recent content in delaunay on StataViz by Asjad Naqvi

item.title: Dali as Delaunay triangles
item.description: Created using the delaunay package ssc install delaunay, replace For more info visit the stata-delaunay GitHub page.

item.title: Distance to the nearest public bathroom in Vienna
